description: KNOWN GAP (pinned for visibility, per the R12 rule): raw tool-result echo -- the model's final text is a verbatim dump of the tool-result JSON it received instead of a synthesis (the raw-context echo mode from docs/solutions weak-model-runtime-robustness-2026-06-07, observed with qwen2.5:3b). NO guard catches this today: the dump is not tool-call-shaped, not empty, and not a prior-turn echo, so it reaches the user raw -- the honest disposition is therefore 'clean'. A future guard flips this fixture's expected block.
